Title: MNT Reform 2

KiCad E.D.A.  kicad 7.0.6+dfsg-1
Rev: 2.5D-2  Id: 1/12
iMXBM internal oscillator output for PCIe1

BOOTCFG_4  0: 1-bit  1: 4-bit
BOOTCFG_15  01: SD
BOOTCFG_12  10: eMMC
BOOTCFG_10  0: eSDHC1  1: eSDHC2

License: CERN-OHL-S 2.0
Engineer: Lukas F. Hartmann
https://mntre.com
MNT Research GmbH
Sheet: /Reform 2 Power/
File: reform2-power.kicad_sch
Main system power converters, enabled by LPC
Up to 40mA consumed by DSI bridge and SD card level shifter
Up to 70mA consumed by DSI bridge
Up to 780mA (!) consumed by USB hub
Powered by main batteries in standby
I2C lines pulled up by SYS 3v3 power near DAC
Powered by coin cell when batteries removed
TX & RX caps are on the SoM
TX & RX caps are on the SoM

License: CERN-OHL-S 2.0
Engineer: Lukas F. Hartmann
https://mntre.com
MNT Research GmbH

ambiguities.description: R117, R118, R119 are marked NOSTUFF/DNP but exact values and net connections for R118 and R119 are partially obscured.
The exact net connections for R154 resistor value is not legible in the image.
The J19 JTAG connector visible in the schematic area is not in the grounding refdes set; could not confirm refdes.
TP8 is labeled T_PMIC_ON_REQ in the grounding nets but visually appears to connect to PMIC_ON_REQ; the exact relationship between T_PMIC_ON_REQ and PMIC_ON_REQ could not be fully resolved.
Pin assignments for U1 are dense; some pin numbers beyond 230 may have been mis-mapped due to image resolution.
Component D25 typed as 'diode' on earlier pages but as 'led' on page 2
Component D26 typed as 'diode' on earlier pages but as 'led' on page 2
The exact pin assignments of Q1, Q2, Q15, Q17 gate connections to U2 BG1/TG1/BG2/TG2 could not be fully traced due to density; assignments inferred from LTC4020 typical circuit topology.
R182, R183 LED current limiting resistors for CHG_STAT LEDs — refdes R183 not in grounding set; may be R182 for one and an alternate refdes for other. Possibly R184 not in set.

Multiple resistor refdes (R10-R24) appear duplicated in grounding list and image — some are Vgs gate resistors for battery balancer FETs (Q5-Q12) and some are battery voltage dividers; exact refdes mapping for each is uncertain due to density.
U4 LTC6803-4 cell voltage sense pins (S0-S12, C0-C11) routing to battery cell nodes not fully traceable in this image due to density — partial net labels only.
SW1 and SW2 net connections (charge mode selection) not clearly readable from image — pins left without net labels.
Q4 PMV50ENEAR gate resistor network and connection to NTC/SHDN not fully traceable; R95 and R172 connections uncertain.

The D25/D26 LED refdes in grounding set clash with D25/D26 PMEG60T10ELR diodes also in the grounding set — schematic appears to use both, page is dense; only PMEG diodes and separate LED symbols can be confirmed but their exact refdes are ambiguous at this scale.

R181 refdes appears to be used for two different resistors (461R for LED5V series resistor and 100k for U19 feedback divider). The grounding data only lists R181 once; one may be R179 or another refdes.
The exact EN pin net label for U14 (LMR16006YQ3) is not clearly readable; it appears to be always-on (tied high or to LPC_VCC) but could not be confirmed.
Net label '3V3_PWR_AUX' appears on the left side connected to U17/R188 area but is not in the grounding NET_LABELS set; it may be 'XUA_RWP_3V3' or a local variant.
PWR_FLAG symbols are present on multiple rails (+5V, +3V3, LPC_VCC, +1V5, +1V2) but their exact pin connections to nets could not all be individually traced.
C128/C148 CB bypass capacitors for U7/U12 boost pins — exact net connection between CB pin and VSW could not be fully traced on this page.
R1 refdes from grounding set may correspond to the 100k resistor near U14 EN pin; the 35R near U7 is associated with R53 visually but R53 is not in the grounding refdes set.

Many U18 pin-to-net assignments are dense and some pin numbers/labels in the LPC11U24FBD48 may be misread due to image resolution; PIO1_xx assignments on the right side of the IC are particularly uncertain.
J22 (Expansion Port) connector pin assignments are partially obscured by dense label routing; some net-to-pin mappings may be incorrect.
R137 appears to be a zero-ohm series resistor on the IMX_RTC_IRQ line; exact connectivity including the downstream net name after R137 could not be fully traced.
R194 routes IMX_WAKE to CHG_RNG but both sides of the net are partially obscured; the routing may differ from what was captured.
LPC_SCL net label appears near R68 output connecting to INA_SCL label; the exact split/merge of these net labels could not be unambiguously resolved.
U9 (TUSB8040PFP) has many pins; exact pin-to-net mapping for downstream port pins (DN2, DN3) is difficult to read precisely from image density — some pin numbers may be misassigned.
USB3_1_SSTXN and USB3_1_SSTXP nets appear on the schematic going to J6 (SSTX/SSTX-) but exact routing through protection ICs is partially obscured.
USB3_2_SSTXN and USB3_2_SSTXP routing through U26 to J5 is partially obscured.
USB3_2_SSTXN, USB3_2_SSTXP net labels appear in the NET_LABELS list but their connections via U26 are not clearly legible.
R84, R85 exact net connections (to PWROND or similar control lines) are unclear from image resolution.
R55 placement relative to J6 SSRX lines and its exact net label connections could not be fully traced.
GRSTz pin of U9 connects via R81 (USB_RESETn), the exact net label could not be confirmed - may be USB_RESETn which is not in the validated net label list.
J9 and J14 exact connector type and all pin assignments are not fully legible; USB_INT1 and USB_INT2 signal origins within U9 are unclear.
U24 OUT pin net label is unclear — it feeds F3 input but the intermediate net label between U24.OUT and F3.1 is not distinctly labelled; assumed unlabelled local wire.
SPK_PWR net appears as an off-page label near U24 output area but its exact connection point (whether from U24 OUT or from F3) is ambiguous from the image.

FB1 value token '2R' at position (149,127) and FB2 value token '38R' at (319,126) — the ferrite bead values read from the image; '220@100MHz' description is from adjacent annotation text. Physical assignment of 2R vs 38R to FB1 vs FB2 should be verified against the BOM.
PWR_FLAG symbols on USBH_3V3 and USBH_1V1 nets are KiCad power-flag pseudo-components; no refdes visible in grounding set for these, so they were not emitted as nodes.
C88 may connect to PWR_FLAG net on USBH_3V3 rather than directly to USBH_3V3 bus — position of PWR_FLAG symbol relative to C88 is ambiguous.
Component D1 typed as 'diode' on earlier pages but as 'power_symbol' on page 7
Component D2 typed as 'diode' on earlier pages but as 'power_symbol' on page 7

Pin numbers on U22 (TPD12S521) for TMDS differential pairs are dense and partially overlapping; some pin assignments (e.g. TMDS_D0- vs DDC_CLK_IN both appearing at pin 27) may be incorrect due to image resolution.
GND bottom pins of U22 (TMDS_GND pins 3,5,8,13,43,52,63,82) are visible but exact pin-to-net assignments are difficult to confirm at this resolution.
J4 shield/shell pins (S0D, S1D, S2D, SKC) visible but net labels not fully legible in image.
R161 refdes and value assignment (10k pulldown on HOTPLUG_DET_IN) inferred from net label; the refdes text is small and partially unclear.
D0, D1, D2 in the grounding refdes set appear to be power/GND flag symbols rather than diodes; treated as power_symbol type.
R103/R107 exact net connections on the PCIE1 TX/RX series resistors (some zero-ohm resistors) are partially obscured by dense routing; some connections inferred from context.
R160 (100k) on PCIE1_RESETn net - exact pin connections partially unclear from image; associated with PERST# signal.
Y3 crystal label - the refdes shown may be X1 or Y3 (25MHz crystal near U23); both X1 and Y3 appear in the refdes set but the image shows one crystal at this location.
Several J10 M.2 connector pins in the 60-75 range have net labels that are partially illegible or show as GND stub symbols - exact net assignments for pins 68, 70, 72, 74 uncertain.
R37, R38 zero-ohm resistors on CLKA_P/CLKA_N lines - source side net labels unclear, may be from SoM or left unconnected.
Several M.2 J10 connector pins labeled with PERn/PERp/PETn/PETp signals (high-speed pairs) have resistors R104-R109 in series but exact pin number assignments on J10 side are partially obscured.

The SD card connector (J3/JJ33) refdes is visible in the image but not in the provided REFDES grounding set; it is referenced in net labels (SSHHEELLLL11, SSHHEELLLL22, CCLLKK, DDAATT00-DDAATT22, CCMMDD, VVDDDD, VVSSSS, CCAARRDD__DDEETTEECCTT, WWRRIITTEE__PPRROOTTEECCTT, CCDD//DDAATT33) so its pins and nets cannot be fully captured.

Level shifter IC for SD data lines (labeled UU88 / TTXXSS00110088EEPPWW in the grounding tokens) appears in the schematic image but its refdes is not in the grounding REFDES set; pins and nets for that device are unresolved.
Capacitors C137 and C138 (10uF and 0.1uF) are visible on the schematic near VCCB/GND but their refdes values are not in the grounding REFDES set, so they cannot be emitted.
Capacitor C16B (0.1uF) is visible near U28 VCCA but its refdes is not in the grounding REFDES set; it may be part of C168 or a separate unlisted component.
Net label CC5566 visible in grounding tokens but not clearly traceable to a specific pin in the image.
Net labels CC113377 and CC113388 visible in grounding tokens and near the SD connector area but specific pin connections not clearly legible.
C162 and C163 appear near J16 (LINE_IN connector) in the image but are not in the grounding refdes set; their values (~1uF each) are visible but refdes cannot be confirmed.
C141 appears near RINPUT1/2 area of U3 with value 4.7uF but is not in the grounding refdes set.
R141 appears near the CTIA/Jack Detect area but cannot be confirmed from grounding set.
The exact routing of LINE_IN signals to LINPUT1/2/3 and RINPUT1/2/3 on U3 cannot be fully traced from the image due to density.
J21 connector pinout and net connections are not fully readable; appears to connect to speaker outputs.

L8 value reads as 22.5uH per designer note but other inductors L9-L11 read 15uH; the butterworth filter note gives L=22.5uH. L8 near SPK_LP may be the output filter inductor with the AS01808AO-3-R speaker.
PWR_FLAG symbols appear multiple times on this page but their exact net connections could not all be resolved with certainty.

The Ethernet magnetics transformer block (P1 internal) pin mappings between LAN-side (TRDx/TRCTx) and line-side (TRPx) are inferred from the 1:1 transformer symbol arrangement; exact internal centre-tap wiring could not be individually traced.

The 75 OHM termination resistors shown inside the transformer block cannot be confirmed as separate discrete components or internal to PP11 — no distinct refdes is visible for them in the grounding set.
Net label 'ETH0_D' appears as 'ETHO_D+' in the image text but only 'ETH0_D' is in the grounding NET_LABELS set; same ambiguity for ETH0_A, ETH0_B, ETH0_C — the '+' suffix may or may not be present.

SSHH11 appears both as a net label and as what appears to be a shield/chassis ground capacitor component; the exact refdes for that capacitor is not in the grounding REFDES set (which is empty), so it is listed as a component named SSHH11 with caution.

C108 and C109 appear to be AC-coupling capacitors on the ML1N/ML0N eDP lanes respectively — the exact series connection between U10 output and J24 input is inferred from schematic topology but pin assignments for the ML1P and ML0P AC-coupling caps (if present as C106 on ML1P side) are partially unclear due to image density.
The REFCLK pin assignment on U10 is listed as pin 54 in value tokens but GPIO3 also appears at pin 54 — likely a pin numbering collision in the token extraction; actual assignment needs verification.

Capacitors C132, C134, C135, C136 are visible in the image near EDP_LCD_VCC and EDP_BL_VCC rails but are NOT in the grounding refdes set — they may belong to another page or the grounding set may be incomplete.
R82 is listed in the grounding refdes set but the value token shows 100k pull-down on EDP_RESETn; the schematic image shows 'RB2' label near that resistor — verified as R82 per grounding set.
VCC net on U10 uses multiple pins (pins 62, 59, 17, 49 visible) and also VPLL pin 62 — pin 62 appears shared which is unlikely; actual VPLL and VCC pin numbers need verification against datasheet.
Cross-page ref 'Reform 2 Power' on page 1 has no matching net or counter-ref on other pages
